lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB coding
lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Reception Level Amplifier.comment: The wiring architecture of the specific model series is represented by the Variant Coding.In the case, that no antenna line is connected/coded, the value "No Signal (Connection Not Relevant)" is sent.

Frequency.comment:
DAB tuner ranges with center frequencies 
from 168.160 MHz until 1491.184 MHz:

The center frequencies supported by the ECU depend from the coded frequency table by the service "DAB - Country Settings".

Canada:
 Band III: 174,928 – 239,2 MHz
 Band L: 1452.816 MHz - 1491.184 MHz

China:
 Band III: 168.160 MHz - 221.568 MHz
 Band L: t.b.d.

Europe:
 Band III: 174.928 MHz - 239.200 MHz
 Band L: 1452.960 MHz - T:1478.640 MHz or S:1490.624 MHz

Korea:
 Band III: 175.280 MHz - 214.736 MHz
 Band L: t.b.d.
